# Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / example
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Dependency or version bump

## Checklist

- [ ] `hadolint Dockerfile` passes
- [ ] `shellcheck` passes for any changed scripts
- [ ] All Compose files validate (`docker compose -f <file> config -q`)
- [ ] The image builds and serves a terminal locally
- [ ] Docs/examples updated where behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under **Unreleased** when user-facing

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, host arch, and what you observed. -->
